overall.description: First-person walk through a rainy, foggy cyberpunk city street at night. The scene features neon-lit buildings including the Arasaka corporation tower, pedestrians with glowing umbrellas, and culminates at the NCART station entrance. The footage is from a video game engine with cinematic lighting and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate district sidewalk with neon signage

events.description: pedestrian with glowing orange umbrella passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along wet sidewalk past the illuminated Arasaka building

entered.detail: large black corporate building with white illuminated Arasaka logo
concrete wall with colorful spray paint markings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow wet sidewalk beside the imposing Arasaka corporate building. Pedestrians with glowing neon umbrellas pass by in the opposite direction. The street is lined with graffiti-covered walls and illuminated by street lamps, with an overpass visible ahead through the fog.

events.description: steps off sidewalk and crosses the wide street intersection
black vehicle passes through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection toward the digital billboards on the far side

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: twin large screens displaying food advertisements
marked pedestrian crossing with yellow and red lines

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as the camera crosses the street. Large digital billboards display advertisements ahead while vehicles pass through the crossing. The Arasaka building falls behind as the overpass structure draws closer.

events.description: passes under overhead highway structure, lighting becomes more shadowed
turns slightly right while continuing forward along the railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath multiple overpass levels toward the distant tower

notable_agents.action: walking ahead with dark clothing and umbrella

entered.detail: massive corporate tower with illuminated windows rising in the distance
safety barrier along the sidewalk edge
various illuminated business signs including green and purple neon

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the shadow of elevated highway overpasses toward a towering cylindrical skyscraper in the distance. The sidewalk is lined with metal railings and neon storefront signs. The digital billboards fade behind as the path continues through the industrial transit corridor.

events.description: arrives at the NCART station entrance with bright cyan and yellow neon signage

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the NCART station area

notable_agents.action: standing near the station entrance ticket machines

entered.detail: transit station with large cyan and yellow neon signage reading NCART
automated entry gates and ticketing kiosks

segments.scene_description: Arriving at the NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit station entrance. The area is sheltered under the station overhang with bright cyan neon illumination. The tall tower fades into the fog behind as the camera approaches the ticket barriers and station entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk street that transitions from the shadow of corporate monoliths to the bright entrance of a transit hub. It begins on a narrow, wet sidewalk beside the imposing Arasaka building, moving past pedestrians with glowing neon umbrellas and graffiti-covered walls. As the camera crosses a wide intersection, the corporate tower recedes and the view opens up to large digital billboards and passing vehicles. The scene then shifts into the industrial shadow of elevated highway overpasses, passing metal railings and neon storefronts while heading toward a distant cylindrical skyscraper. Finally, the path leads under a sheltered overhang into the bright cyan illumination of the NCART station entrance as the distant tower fades into the fog.
